title: belotia grewiifolia var. lessertiana
intro: Belotia grewiifolia var. lessertiana, also known as the lesser Belotia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, characterized by its aromatic leaves and small white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Belotia grewiifolia var. lessertiana include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
